findings: Features Average Packet Size, Avg Bwd Segment Size, Bwd Packet Length Mean, and Bwd Packet Length Std exhibit high class-conditioned distribution differences, indicating distinct representational patterns.
These features are known to have strong redundancy relations as indicated by near-perfect correlations reported in the local context.
The coexistence of strong redundancy and strong class-conditioned distribution differences confirms the tension between redundancy and representation in this feature subset.
contradictions: Unresolved tension remains regarding whether effectively constant features in the group are genuine signals or artifacts.
limitations: No direct pairwise relation verification was performed in this step; reliance on prior reported correlations in local context.
Distribution verification for Destination Port was not performed in this step.
